name_en: [Genuine Leather] #LouLou puffer# LOULOU PUFFER Mini Quilted Lambskin Bag, a super hot style with the latest mini size from the counter! Made with genuine ZP leather, soft and delicate to the touch, small and cute like a marshmallow when carried! Features a zippered interior pocket for phone and valuables, and a card slot; otherwise, no extra pockets, small but fully functional! Size: 23x15.5x5.8cm Model: 620333 168520
